name: Replay 历史筛选与级联删除
description: 验证 Replay 历史默认显示全部、模板筛选、无模板筛选，以及模板删除后的历史级联删除

steps.message: ==== 步骤 1: 清理 Replay 数据 ====

steps.code: (async () => { const base = '/_bifrost/api/replay'; const requests = await fetch(`${base}/requests?limit=200`).then((r) => r.json()); for (const request of requests.requests || []) { await fetch(`${base}/requests/${encodeURIComponent(request.id)}`, { method: 'DELETE' }); } const groups = await fetch(`${base}/groups`).then((r) => r.json()); for (const group of groups.groups || []) { await fetch(`${base}/groups/${encodeURIComponent(group.id)}`, { method: 'DELETE' }); } await fetch(`${base}/history`, { method: 'DELETE' }); return true; })()

steps.message: ==== 步骤 2: 保存模板并执行一次 ====

steps.code: (async () => { const response = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/requests?saved=true&limit=100').then((r) => r.json()); const request = (response.requests || []).find((item) => item.name === '${savedName}'); return request?.id || ''; })()

steps.message: ==== 步骤 3: 新建无模板 replay 并执行一次 ====
==== 步骤 4: 重新进入 Replay，验证历史默认显示全部 ====

steps.condition: (() => { const el = document.querySelector("[data-testid='replay-history-scope']"); return !!el && el.textContent.includes('All replay history'); })()
steps.message: 历史面板默认显示全部历史
全部历史包含 2 条记录
==== 步骤 5: 选择模板后仅显示模板历史 ====
选择模板后历史范围切换到模板
模板历史只显示 1 条记录
==== 步骤 6: 新建 replay 后仅显示无模板历史 ====

steps.condition: (() => { const el = document.querySelector("[data-testid='replay-history-scope']"); return !!el && el.textContent.includes('Unbound replay history'); })()
steps.message: 新建 replay 后历史范围切换到无模板
无模板历史只显示 1 条记录
==== 步骤 7: 删除模板后历史级联删除 ====

steps.code: (async () => { await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/requests/${requestId}', { method: 'DELETE' }); const requestHistory = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/history?request_id=${requestId}&limit=10').then((r) => r.json()); const allHistory = await fetch('/_bifrost/api/replay/history?limit=10').then((r) => r.json()); return requestHistory.total === 0 && allHistory.total === 1; })()

steps.message: 模板删除后对应历史已级联删除
